title: Machine Learning Engineer I
description: DocuSign is hiring a Machine Learning Engineer I to build intelligent features that automate document workflows. Working fully remote from Chicago or anywhere in the US, you'll develop models for signature detection, document classification, and anomaly detection. Join our AI team advancing how millions of people sign and manage agreements globally.
responsibilities: Design and train machine learning models for document understanding and processing
Implement data pipelines and feature engineering workflows
Evaluate model performance using appropriate metrics and experimentation frameworks
Collaborate with product and engineering teams to integrate models into production systems
Document model architecture and maintain reproducible ML workflows
Contribute to model optimization and inference performance improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or related field
skills: Understanding of computer vision or NLP (preferred)

benefits: Competitive health, dental, vision, and FSA/HSA options
